articles.title: Are perps swaps? A quick look at that CME suit: State of Crypto

articles.title: Polymarket reportedly paid creators to post deceptive videos about fake bets
articles.description: Many of those videos were reportedly filmed on “near-perfect copies” of the Polymarket website, while featuring trades and winnings that were not real.

articles.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as a renewed Hormuz threat clouds US-Iran ceasefire talks
articles.description: Crypto firmed over the weekend after Friday's sell-off, with bitcoin recovering toward $64,000. Permanent ceasefire talks open in Switzerland, but Iran's order to close the Strait of Hormuz again revives the risk the deal was meant to settle.
